name: Baked Tofu and Rice Patties
recipeIngredient: 4 tbsp Whole wheat pastry flour, as needed
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients, except for the flour, in a medium-sized bowl and mix well.
2. Using your hands, shape the mixture into 6 patties. Press firmly so that the patties hold together well.
3. Dredge both sides of each patty in the flour and place them on a well-oiled cookie sheet.
4. Bake the patties at 400°F for 25-30 minutes, or until they are golden brown. Turn the patties over halfway through the baking.
5. Serve them with the sauce of your choice, accompanied by a steamed vegetable and a salad.
